title: Electronic system
abstract: An electronic system (20) for measuring parameters of a drug delivery device (1), comprising a sensing unit (23) configured to provide information about a change in the spatial position of the electronic system, a localization unit (25) for assisting the localization of the electronic system, and a processor unit (24) operatively connected to the sensing and localization unit, wherein the processor unit is configured, based on a comparison of the information provided by the sensing unit with a predefined criterion, to cause the localization unit to switch to a condition in which a user is informed on the location of the electronic system, when the information about the change in the spatial position provided by the sensing unit meets the predefined criterion.
claims: Claims Claims 1. An electronic system (20) for measuring parameters of a drug delivery device (1), comprising: a sensing unit (23) configured to provide information about a change in the spatial position of the electronic system; a localization unit (25) for assisting the localization of the electronic system; and a processor unit (24) operatively connected to the sensing and localization unit, wherein the processor unit is configured, based on a comparison of the information provided by the sensing unit with a predefined criterion, to cause the localization unit to switch to a condition in which a user is informed on the location of the electronic system, when the information about the change in the spatial position provided by the sensing unit meets the predefined criterion. 2. The electronic system (20) according to claim 1, wherein the electronic system is a reusable add-on device (20) that can be repeatedly detachably attached to a drug delivery device (1). 3. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the electronic system comprises an electronic system housing (21), wherein the electronic system housing encloses the sensing unit (23), the localization unit (25) and the processor unit (24), and wherein the sensing unit is configured to provide information about a change in the spatial position of the electronic system housing. 4. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the sensing unit (23) comprises an inertial sensor. 5. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the predefined criterion comprises: - information indicative of a predefined kinematic event of the electronic system (20), and - an expiration of a predefined time after the predefined kinematic event. 6. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the claims 1-4, wherein the predefined criterion comprises - information indicative of a first predefined kinematic event about the electronic system (20), - an expiration of a predefined time after the first predefined kinematic event has been detected, and - the absence of an information indicative of a second predefined kinematic event within the predefined time that is different from the first predefined kinematic event. 7. The electronic system (20) according to any one of claims 5 and 6, wherein the predefined kinematic event comprises information indicative of an acceleration value of the electronic system. 8. The electronic system (20) according to claim 7, wherein the acceleration value is greater than or equal to the acceleration due to gravity. 9. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the claims 5 to 8, wherein the predefined kinematic event comprises information indicative of an acceleration of the electronic system in the direction of the earth's gravitational force. 10. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the localization unit (25) is configured to be visibly, audibly, tactilely and/or electronically detectable in the condition in which the user is informed about the position of the electronic system. 11. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the claims 2-10, wherein the electronic system is configured to output a warning signal if the electronic system is detached from the drug delivery device (1). 12. The electronic system (20) according to claim 11, wherein the localization unit (25) is configured to output the warning signal. 13. The electronic system (20) according to claim 11, wherein the electronic system comprises a warning unit, configured to output the warning signal, and wherein the warning unit and the localization unit (25) are different units. 14. The electronic system (20) according to any one of the preceding claims, wherein the localization unit (25) is configured to be visibly, audibly, tactilely and/or electronically detectable in the condition in which the user is informed about the position of the electronic system, and wherein the localization unit is configured to be not visibly, audibly, tactilely and/or electronically detectable before the localization unit switches to the condition in which the user is informed about the position of the electronic system. 15. A drug delivery device (1) comprising the electronic system (20) according to any one of the preceding claims. 16. The drug delivery device (1) according to claim 15, configured to retain a drug container (14) with a drug or comprising a drug container (14) with a drug. 17. A method for assisting in the localization of an electronic system (20) comprising the following steps: - providing information about a change in the spatial position of the electronic system; - comparing the information about the change in the spatial position of the electronic system with a predefined criterion; - causing the electronic system to switch to a condition in which a user is informed about the position of the electronic system, when the change in the spatial position meets the predefined criterion. 18. A computer program product, e.g. a computer program or a computer readable storage medium, comprising instruction which when carried out by a processor cause the electronic system (20) according to any one of the claims 1-16 to perform the method according to claim 1
